classification_rationale: This is an instructional/educational video demonstrating FLS Peg Transfer setup, equipment overview, and technique explanation. The video shows a person in casual attire presenting the task materials (peg board, graspers, rubber pegs) to camera in a deliberate educational manner, with multiple overview shots and close-ups of tools. This is NOT a performance attempt—no actual timed task execution is visible. The framing, pacing, and setup-focused presentation indicate teaching/demonstration content rather than a scored performance.

scoring_determination: NOT SCORED — This is instructional content, not a performance attempt. No timed execution, no object transfers, no phase completion times are measurable. The video demonstrates equipment and setup only.

confidence_rationale: Classification is definitive based on clear instructional framing, lack of task execution, equipment-focused presentation, and absence of any timed performance data. This is unambiguously educational content.
